dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.postsDescription: Create drafts, publish essays, and manage your knowledge base.
dashboard.assetsDescription: Local upload management lands in the editor phase.
dashboard.analyticsDescription: Page views and referrers are planned after publishing is solid.

setup.title: Set up PandaBlog
setup.description: Create the admin password for this deployment.

posts.taxonomyLoadFailed: Could not load tags or categories
posts.emptyDescription: Create your first draft to start building the knowledge base.
posts.assignedEmptyDescription: Posts assigned here will appear in this list.

passwordPrompt.title: Set Post Password
passwordPrompt.description: Enter the password readers will need to open this post.
passwordPrompt.label: Password

bulk.deleteOneDescription: This permanently removes the archived post and its related data. This cannot be undone.
bulk.deleteManyDescription: These archived posts and their related data will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
bulk.mixedDescription: Active posts will be archived. Already archived posts will be permanently deleted.
bulk.archiveOneDescription: The post will move to Archived and can be restored later.
bulk.archiveManyDescription: These posts will move to Archived and can be restored later.
bulk.partialFailedTitle: Some posts could not be processed
bulk.partialFailedFallback: Some posts could not be processed

taxonomy.name: Name
taxonomy.noCategoriesDescription: Create categories to organize your posts.
taxonomy.categoryNotFoundDescription: Return to categories to choose another item.
taxonomy.tagCloudHelp: Click a tag to filter, click "Open" for public posts view
taxonomy.noTagsDescription: Create tags to connect related posts.
taxonomy.tagNotFoundDescription: Return to tags to choose another item.

media.title: Media Library
media.createFolderDescription: Add a folder to organize files in the media library.
media.renameFolderDescription: Update the folder name shown in the media library.
media.deleteFolderDescription: Delete folder "{name}"? Files will stay in the library.
media.deleteFileReferenced: Delete "{name}"? It is referenced {count} time(s) and may break content.
media.selectTagsHint: Select one or more tags to filter files.
media.bulkTagsDescription: Set tags on {count}. Separate tags with commas. Leave empty to clear tags.
media.bulkCommentDescription: Set the comment on {count}. Leave empty to clear the comment.
media.bulkDeleteDescription: Delete {count} file(s)? This cannot be undone.
media.createFolderFirst: Create a folder before assigning files.
media.privateUploadHelp: Only admins and the uploader can view this file directly.
media.name: Name
media.directUrlHelp: Paste a direct link to an image. It will be downloaded into the media library so you can reuse it later.
media.deleteOrphansDescription: Delete {count} orphan file(s)? This removes database records and physical files.

editor.leaveDescription: Leave this editor, save to database, or discard local edits.
editor.unsavedBody: Your edits are not saved to the database yet.

toolbar.editLinkDescription: Set URL, display text, and how the link should open.
toolbar.editLinkRemoveDescription: Add or update the URL for the selected text. Leave empty to remove the link.

nodeViews.stripSelectedTitle: Strip selected annotations back to text
nodeViews.stripAllTitle: Strip all annotations back to text
nodeViews.addFilesDescription: Attach documents, images, archives, or other downloads.
nodeViews.addMediaDescription: Add media of any type: image, video, audio, document, archive...

relatedPost.title: Link a related post
relatedPost.description: Search by title or slug. The two posts will be linked bidirectionally.
relatedPost.startTyping: Start typing to find a post to link.

settingsPanel.selectBlock: Select a block to edit its settings.
settingsPanel.heading: Heading
settingsPanel.title: Title
settingsPanel.caption: Caption
settingsPanel.showTotalLines: Show total lines in code header
settingsPanel.onlyOnePane: Only one pane open at a time
settingsPanel.diffHelp: Select the diff block in the editor to edit the before and after text in two columns.
settingsPanel.annotationHelp: Use the Annotate button in the block toolbar to generate readings. The block's default language is used unless the toolbar overrides it.

sidebar.privateDescription: Hidden from public lists and search.
sidebar.passwordDescription: Hidden from public lists and search, content requires a password.
sidebar.passwordPlaceholder: Leave blank to use login password

blocks.moveNestedBlock: Use toolbar actions to move nested block
blocks.editHtmlDescription: Update the HTML for the selected block.
blocks.embedDescription: Paste a video, audio, or website URL to embed in the post.
blocks.embedBlockedHelp: If this site blocks embedding, open it in a new tab:
blocks.remoteMediaDescription: Use a remote image, video, audio, or document URL for this Media + Text block.

users.title: Users
users.emptyDescription: Adjust the filters or create a new user.

bulk.disableDescription: Disabled users cannot sign in. Their posts and media remain assigned to their account.
bulk.enableDescription: Enabled users can sign in again with their existing credentials.
bulk.partialFailedTitle: Some users could not be updated

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: Operational overview for access, activity, and errors.
logs.noRecentErrors: No error logs in the selected period.
logs.emptyAccess: No access logs for current filter.
logs.emptyErrors: No error logs for current filter.
logs.emptyActivity: No activity logs for current filter.

settings.title: Logging settings
settings.description: Runtime logging controls backed by app settings.
settings.masterDescription: Enable or silence logging globally without changing individual categories.
settings.categoriesDescription: Choose which operational events are recorded.
settings.debugWarning: Debug is disabled in production unless override is enabled.
settings.levelsDescription: Reduce noisy events and redact sensitive metadata before it reaches storage.
settings.minimumLevelHint: Only events at this level or higher are mirrored to console output.
settings.samplingRateHint: Fraction of access log requests to record. Use 0.1 to capture 10% of traffic.
settings.excludedPathsHint: One path prefix per line. Matching requests are not written to access logs.
settings.excludedStatusCodesHint: Comma or newline separated HTTP status codes to skip.
settings.redactedFieldsHint: Field names removed from metadata before writing activity and error logs.
settings.limitsDescription: Keep large metadata payloads from bloating log rows.
settings.maxMetadataHint: Maximum metadata stored per log entry. Larger payloads are truncated.
settings.retentionDescription: Suggested age caps for manual cleanup. They are not enforced automatically.
settings.cleanupDescription: Run cleanup only when needed. Choose a log type, a rule, and confirm the deletion.
settings.enableLoggingDescription: Controls whether access, activity, and error rows are written.
settings.consoleOutputDescription: Mirror log events to the server console for local debugging.
settings.accessLogsDescription: Record request method, path, status, duration, and client details.
settings.activityLogsDescription: Record admin actions such as edits, sign-ins, and cleanup runs.
settings.errorLogsDescription: Record handled server errors and exception context.
settings.debugLogsDescription: Allow debug-level events when the runtime also permits them.
settings.overrideDebugProtectionDescription: Permit debug logging in production when debug logging is enabled.
settings.deleteOlderThanDescription: Remove rows whose timestamp is older than the day count.
settings.keepLatestDescription: Keep the newest N rows and remove older entries.
settings.cleanupAccessDescription: HTTP request history and response metadata.
settings.cleanupActivityDescription: Admin actions and system audit records.
settings.cleanupErrorDescription: Server errors, stack traces, and request context.
settings.keepLatestDescriptionDialog: Keep the latest {count} {label} and delete older rows.
settings.keepLatestHint: Newest rows are preserved; older rows are deleted.
settings.retentionDefaultHint: Uses {days} days from the saved retention default unless you enter another value.
settings.cleanupValueInvalid: Cleanup value must be a positive whole number

system.title: System
system.description: Choose operational defaults for the admin panel.
system.languageDescription: This changes the admin panel language for every administrator.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Configure the owner bio widget shown in the public sidebar.
profile.showInSidebar: Show this profile in the public site sidebar
profile.hideBioHelp: Hide the owner bio card without deleting the saved profile content.
profile.userInfoDescription: The admin username is fixed as admin. Change the password here when needed.

media.title: Media
media.description: Configure file upload limits, allowed types, and deduplication.
media.maxFilesPerUploadHint: Limits concurrent uploads to reduce memory usage
media.perceptualHashingHelp: Detect resized/recompressed versions of the same image
media.downloadCleanupHint: Temporary download zip files are deleted after this many hours (1-168)
media.publicBaseUrlHint: Leave blank to serve media through this app.
media.localOnlyHelp: Allow direct media file requests only from localhost.
media.enableCleanupHelp: Delete unreferenced files on a schedule.

themes.title: Themes
themes.description: Choose the active visual theme, preview it, or upload a custom theme package.

general.title: General
general.description: Configure your site identity, footer, and public access mode.
general.headerDescription: Configure the public header, site identity, and browser icon.
general.subtitle: Subtitle
general.trustProxyHelp: Use forwarded IP headers and secure unlock cookies when deployed behind an HTTPS reverse proxy.
general.footerDescription: Configure copyright text, footer links, social icon links, and optional filing information.
general.filingsDescription: Add optional filing text and links shown in the public footer.
general.visibilityDescription: Controls whether the public site is reachable to anonymous visitors.
general.publicDescription: Anyone can browse the site. Per-post visibility still applies.
general.privateDescription: Only logged-in admins can browse. Anonymous visitors are sent to login.

search.title: Search
search.prompt: Type a query above to search the blog.

home.emptyDescription: Once you publish a post it will appear here.

postList.sitePrivateDescription: This blog is currently private. Sign in as admin to view posts.
postList.emptyDescription: Publish your first note from the admin area.

post.sitePrivateDescription: This blog is currently private. Sign in as admin to continue.

passwordGate.title: This post is protected
passwordGate.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again later.

category.emptyDescription: Published posts assigned to this category will appear here.

tag.emptyDescription: Published posts assigned to this tag will appear here.

sidebar.knowledgeGraphDescription: Graph view is reserved for linked concepts and related posts.
